summary: Iteration 78: Verified 3 bug fixes for 360° avatar style persistence. All 25 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Landing V2, login, and AI Studio with avatar gallery all working correctly.

details: ✓ AvatarVariantRequest has avatar_style field with default 'realistic'
✓ generate_avatar_variant uses avatar_style parameter with is_3d check
✓ 3D style prompts contain 'do NOT make it photorealistic'
✓ applyClothing uses tempAvatar.url for 3D styles (is3d ? tempAvatar.url)
✓ generateAngle uses tempAvatar.url for 3D styles (found 2 occurrences)
✓ generateAngle sends avatar_style to API (found 3 occurrences)
✓ Download button uses fetch+blob download pattern
✓ saveAvatarAndClose persists avatar_style in both edit and new avatar cases
✓ openAvatarForEdit restores avatar_style from saved avatar
✓ tempAvatar stores avatar_style when created from prompt mode
✓ tempAvatar stores avatar_style when created from photo mode
✓ Landing V2 hero text 'Your agents. Your campaigns. Every channel.' displayed
✓ Login and navigation to Marketing AI Studio works
✓ Presenter Avatar section with gallery visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 verified all 3 bug fixes: (1) 360° view now uses tempAvatar.url for 3D styles (3d_pixar, 3d_cartoon) instead of source_photo_url - this prevents converting Pixar/3D avatars to realistic photos. The is3d check is: `const is3d = tempAvatar?.avatar_style && tempAvatar.avatar_style !== 'realistic'`. (2) Download button now uses fetch+blob pattern instead of <a target=_blank> which was opening in new tab. (3) avatar_style is now persisted in saveAvatarAndClose, saveAvatarAsNew, and restored in openAvatarForEdit. All code structure verified via static analysis. Actual AI generation not tested (requires API credits).

features_verified.bug_fix_1_360_view_3d_style: ✓ applyClothing and generateAngle use tempAvatar.url for 3D styles
features_verified.bug_fix_2_download_button: ✓ Download button uses fetch+blob pattern, not target=_blank
features_verified.bug_fix_3_avatar_style_persistence: ✓ avatar_style persisted in save functions and restored in edit
features_verified.backend_3d_prompts: ✓ 3D prompts contain 'do NOT make it photorealistic'
features_verified.ai_studio_ui: ✓ Marketing AI Studio loads with avatar gallery
